title: Who Votes in the 2026 Grammy Awards: Recording Academy Voting Demographics
text: The Recording Academy's voting members comprise artists, producers, engineers, songwriters, and executives who shape the outcomes of Music's Biggest Night through a two-round voting process. First Round voting occurred October 3-15, 2025, determining nominees across all 95 Grammy categories. Final Round voting took place December 12, 2025 through January 5, 2026, deciding award winners. Members cast ballots through their personal dashboards, with each vote securely submitted by active music professionals in their respective fields. The Academy invited approximately 3,600 new members to its 2025 class, significantly diversifying the voting body. Current membership reflects substantial demographic shifts with nearly 50% identifying as women, more than half identifying as people of color, and most members under 40 years old. The Academy invited all voting members of the Latin Recording Academy to join their ranks, with nearly 1,000 accepting the offer and now comprising 28% of all new members, reflecting intentional efforts to expand Latin music representation in voting.
